data.title: 200 Million XRP On The Move—Is Ripple Preparing For A Big Play?
data.description:
Ripple’s XRP has been one of the hottest cryptos in the market thanks to its impressive price performance, especially after US President Donald Trump’s reelection. Trading below $1 for most of 2024, XRP hits its stride days after the November elections, breaking the $1 level on November 6th, and the $2 barrier by December 2nd, then surging past $3.30 on January 18th.  Now, Ripple is back in...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/200-million-xrp-on-the-move-is-ripple-preparing-for-a-big-play/

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale once again increased its BTC short position, with a total position size of US$194 million and a liquidation price of US$85,950.87
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale added another 1 million USDC as margin to Hyperliquid 2 minutes ago, and added 700,000 USDC margin to GMX.
Current position situation:
Hyperliquid: 40x BTC short order, no change in position
GMX: Added 44.97x BTC short order, holding 30.76 million US dollars, opening price $84,538.11, liquidation price $85,950.87
The total size of BTC short orders on the two platforms has reached 194 million US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin eyes $105K – Can liquidity injections spark a bullish rally?
data.description:
Bitcoin's price has been in line with global liquidity flows, fueling speculation about a rally to $105K.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-eyes-105k-can-liquidity-injections-spark-a-bullish-rally/

data.title: Trump family crypto project WLFI clarifies: accuses WSJ and Bloomberg of false reports, saying they are damaging to the crypto industry
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In response to recent reports by the Wall Street Journal and Bloomberg about the WLFI project and its negotiations with Binance, the Trump family-backed DeFi project WLFI issued a statement on the X platform, saying that the relevant reports were unconfirmed, politically motivated, and intended to harm the crypto industry.
WLFI emphasized: "We are a DeFi project dedicated to building and popularizing a new financial system with the goal of benefiting millions of people. It is an honor to work with leading blockchain protocols and organizations to jointly promote the development of the industry. I hope everyone will ignore false reports, not be misled by exaggerated headlines, and directly pay attention to official updates."

data.title: Odin.fun Announces Strategic Investment from Taproot Wizards
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Odin.fun, a Bitcoin Meme coin fast trading platform launched by Bioniq founder Bob Bodily, announced the completion of a new round of strategic financing, with Taproot Wizards participating in the investment. The specific investment amount has not been disclosed yet. The new funds are intended to support the development of DeFi on the Bitcoin chain. It is reported that after the transaction is completed, Odin.fun will continue to operate independently and continue to be led by Bob Bodily.

data.title: Gate.io Innovation Zone launched MUBARAK globally, with the highest increase reaching 461%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, Gate.io Innovation Zone launched MUBARAK for the first time globally at 11:40 (UTC+8) on March 14, and the highest increase after the launch exceeded 461%.

data.title: Berachain ecological social trading platform Berally is suspected of being attacked, and the official reminds users to temporarily revoke dApp and Staking permissions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Berally, a social trading platform in the Berachain ecosystem, announced that its deployer key was suspected to be leaked, resulting in all vesting tokens being sold and withdrawn from the liquidity pool.
Berally emphasized that the dApp contract itself was not affected and remained safe, but it was recommended that users temporarily revoke access to dApp and Staking to prevent potential risks.

data.title: Beeple's Digital Artwork Sold for $69 Million in 2021
data.description: According to Foresight News, on this day in 2021, the American artist Beeple's digital artwork, 'Everydays: The First 5000 Days,' was sold for $69 million. The transaction was notable for its use of virtual currency as the payment method, marking a significant moment in the art world and the growing acceptance of digital currencies.

data.title: UK Court Denies Search for Lost Bitcoin Hard Drive
data.description: According to Foresight News, software engineer James Howells has shared a screenshot of the final ruling from the UK Court of Appeal, which prohibits him from searching a landfill where he believes a hard drive containing over 8,000 bitcoins, valued at approximately $680 million, was discarded. Howells mined these bitcoins in 2009 but mistakenly disposed of the hard drive in 2013. Since then, he has been engaged in a lengthy legal battle to gain access to the landfill.
